prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response: I am so deeply sorry for your loss. My heart goes out to you during this incredibly difficult time. Please know that I'm here for you, and I'm thinking of you and your family. Your mum was an amazing person who touched so many lives, and she will be deeply missed. Sending you love and strength.
